title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 73.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Hull,
    Who was chased by a virulent Bull;
    But she seized on a spade,
    And called out - "Who's afraid!"
    Which distracted that virulent Bull.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 73." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
